info.name: GoRest - CI Environment Check
info.description: This collection is designed to run in CI only. It validates that GoRest's Cloudflare protection is active and behaving as expected from a cloud runner IP. All assertions here are intentional — a 403 with an HTML challenge page is the correct and expected response from this environment.

exec: pm.test('Cloudflare returns 403 from CI runner IP', () => {
pm.test('GoRest API is reachable but access is restricted by Cloudflare', () => {
